intro: Swap to a custom lofi soundtrack by the incredible Meltycanon as you reassemble lost spirits.
description:
Samar is a young witch working the spirit-swapping night shift in the eastern outskirts of Demashq. A recent spike in spirits crossing over from another dimension breaks the chill atmosphere of their night shift, so with her trusty familiar Z by her side, she sets off into the city to find out what’s happened. With a popular band scheduled to kick off their big comeback tour in Demashq, Samar needs to work quickly before the city is overrun with stans and spirits alike!
-Cast powerful spells by arranging spirits into special patterns to unlock potent powers.
-Bond with a cast of witches and demons… and maybe even smooch!
-Decorate Samar's bedroom. Earn trinkets and keepsakes as you play, and place them to make the space your own. 
-Enjoy unique game modes, including Endless and local Versus!
